L1_headline: + SEM – Christopher Weigl received 20,000 restricted stock grant. | 10/28/25
L2_brief: Christopher Weigl, Chief Accounting Officer of Select Medical Holdings, received a grant of 20,000 restricted shares on October 28, 2025, at no cost. The shares vest in full on October 28, 2029 (4-year cliff vesting). This is a standard equity compensation award that increases his direct holdings to 54,254 shares.

L3_detailed.pattern_notes: This is a restricted stock grant as part of executive compensation with a 4-year cliff vesting period (vests October 28, 2029). The grant represents approximately 37% of his total holdings, indicating meaningful equity alignment with shareholders. This is routine annual/periodic equity compensation for a CAO-level executive.
risks_flagged: Restricted stock with 4-year cliff vesting - not immediately liquid
No 10b5-1 plan noted - this is an acquisition/grant, not a sale
